reportsAndFeedbackDescription: View system reports and user feedback
homeSubtitle: Your ultimate destination for planning and booking services for any event. Let's make your celebration unforgettable.

footerDescription: Your trusted platform for discovering events and connecting with top service providers.
aboutUsText1: Welcome to CelebrateHub, your premier destination for all your event planning needs. Our mission is to connect you with the best service providers to make your special occasions unforgettable. Whether you're planning a wedding, a corporate event, or a small private party, we have the resources and expertise to help you every step of the way.
ourStoryText1: Founded in 2023, CelebrateHub was born out of a passion for creating memorable experiences. Our founders, a team of experienced event planners and tech enthusiasts, saw a need for a centralized platform where clients could easily find and book reliable service providers. Today, we are proud to have helped thousands of clients bring their dream events to life.
offer1: A curated selection of top-rated service providers
offer4: Inspiring ideas and resources for your events
contactText1: We'd love to hear from you! Whether you have a question about our services, need assistance with your booking, or just want to share your experience, feel free to reach out to us.
termsIntro: Please read these terms of service carefully before using our website. By accessing or using our services, you agree to be bound by these terms.
introductionText: Welcome to CelebrateHub. These are the terms and conditions governing your access to and use of the website CelebrateHub and its related sub-domains, sites, services, and tools.
userResponsibilitiesText: You are responsible for your account and any activity on it. You agree to provide accurate information and keep it updated. You must not use our services for any illegal or unauthorized purpose.
limitationOfLiabilityText: CelebrateHub is not liable for any direct, indirect, incidental, special, or consequential damages resulting from the use or inability to use our services.
changesToTermsText: We reserve the right to modify these terms at any time. We will notify you of any changes by posting the new terms on this page. Your continued use of the service after any such changes constitutes your acceptance of the new terms.
phoneInvalid: Phone number must be 8 digits and start with 7 or 9
